description_long: This perfume bottle features a rounded, matte black glass body with a prominent, sculpted flower-shaped cap in a dark gray hue. The neck of the bottle is adorned with a beige ring and a small metallic charm, adding a touch of elegance. A silver bow sits just below the neck, enhancing the bottle's decorative appeal. The front of the bottle displays a rectangular black label with the word 'Dolce' in elegant script and 'Dolce & Gabbana' in smaller print beneath it. The overall design is sophisticated and luxurious, with a harmonious blend of smooth curves and ornamental details. The bottle's silhouette is bulbous at the base, tapering gently toward the neck and capped with the elaborate floral top.
description: A matte black, rounded perfume bottle with a sculpted flower cap, silver bow, and elegant label reading 'Dolce Dolce & Gabbana'. Decorative accents include a beige neck ring and metallic charm.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black label with 'Dolce Dolce & Gabbana', the silver bow, and the full flower cap detail.
description_view_1: Angled rear view reveals the beige neck ring, metallic charm, and the bottle's smooth, unadorned back.
description_view_2: Direct rear view highlights the bottle's rounded shape, beige neck ring, and the back of the flower cap.
description_view_3: Side-rear view displays the metallic charm hanging from the neck and the curvature of the bottle.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular black label on the front of the bottle with white script text 'Dolce' and smaller text 'Dolce & Gabbana' beneath it.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is a large, sculpted flower in dark gray plastic, with layered petals and a textured finish. It appears removable and serves as a decorative focal point.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The silhouette is bulbous and rounded at the base, tapering gently toward the neck, with a prominent, wide flower-shaped cap on top.
attribute_decorative_elements: Small metallic charm hanging from the neck
